source_pr.title: ddl: reduce the time to run unit tests
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Reduce the time to run unit tests in `ddl` package. ### What is changed and how it works? - Split tests. Relate to #8612. - Remove some operations of "drop table" in tests. ``` Before this PR: ok github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl 25.074s coverage: 79.5% of statements ok github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/failtest 7.919s coverage: 0.0% of statements After this PR: ok github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl 17.210s coverage: 79.5% of statements ok github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/failtest 3.240s coverage: 0.0% of statements ``` ### Check List Tests - Unit test --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8585)

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: reduce the time to run unit tests.
fix_pattern: ddl: reduce the time to run unit tests

evidence: files: ddl/db_integration_test.go, ddl/db_partition_test.go, ddl/db_test.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/failtest/fail_db_test.go, ddl/mock.go, sessionctx/variable/statusvar.go
